SEARCH
Package com.example.eventsapp

Class UserNotification

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventsapp.UserNotification
public class UserNotification extends Object
Represents a notification intended for a user within the application's UI. This class is used for runtime notification handling and display in the user's inbox.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • UserNotification

      public UserNotification(UserNotification.Type type, String title, String eventName, String message)
      Constructs a UserNotification.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of notification.
      title - The title string.
      eventName - The name of the event associated with the notification.
      message - The descriptive message.
